---
title: "ns_simulations"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Non-Spherical Simulations

### Effect of k

**Fixed:**

-   N: 250

**Test:**

-   k = 2, 3, 4

**Single Run Simulations:**

```{r}
#| label: k = 2 
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 250/2

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# join points to create data frame
k2_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2]))

# scaling
k2_df_scaled <- k2_df
k2_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k2_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k2_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: k = 2 crab

k2_ns_df <- k2_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

k2_ns_df
write.csv(k2_ns_df, "k_crab2_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: k = 3
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 252/3

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma3 <- matrix(c(4, 1.5,
                   1.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster3 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(6, -3.5), 
                    Sigma = sigma3)

# join points to create data frame
k3_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1], cluster3[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2], cluster3[,2]),
  cluster = factor(rep(c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3"),
                       each = n)))
# scaling
k3_df_scaled <- k3_df
k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k3_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: k = 3 crab

k3_ns_df <- k3_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

k3_ns_df
write.csv(k3_ns_df, "k_crab3_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: k = 4
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 252/4

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma3 <- matrix(c(4, 1.5,
                   1.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster3 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(4, -3.5), 
                    Sigma = sigma3)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma4 <- matrix(c(2, 0.5, 
                   0.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster4 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(10, 1), 
                    Sigma = sigma4)

# join points to create data frame
k4_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1], cluster3[,1], cluster4[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2], cluster3[,2], cluster4[,2]),
  cluster = factor(rep(c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3", "Cluster 4"),
                       each = n)))
# scaling
k4_df_scaled <- k4_df
k4_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k4_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k4_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: k = 4 crab

k4_ns_df <- k4_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

k4_ns_df
write.csv(k3_ns_df, "k_crab4_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

### Effect of Sample Size

```{r}
#| label: 100 ss
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 102/3

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma3 <- matrix(c(4, 1.5,
                   1.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster3 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(6, -3.5), 
                    Sigma = sigma3)

# join points to create data frame
k3_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1], cluster3[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2], cluster3[,2]),
  cluster = factor(rep(c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3"),
                       each = n)))
# scaling
k3_df_scaled <- k3_df
k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k3_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: 100 ss crab

ss100_ns_df <- k3_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

ss100_ns_df
write.csv(ss100_ns_df, "ss100_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: 250 ss
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 252/3

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma3 <- matrix(c(4, 1.5,
                   1.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster3 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(6, -3.5), 
                    Sigma = sigma3)

# join points to create data frame
k3_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1], cluster3[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2], cluster3[,2]),
  cluster = factor(rep(c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3"),
                       each = n)))
# scaling
k3_df_scaled <- k3_df
k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k3_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: 250 ss crab

ss250_ns_df <- k3_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

ss250_ns_df
write.csv(ss250_ns_df, "ss250_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: 400 ss
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 402/3

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma3 <- matrix(c(4, 1.5,
                   1.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster3 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(6, -3.5), 
                    Sigma = sigma3)

# join points to create data frame
k3_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1], cluster3[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2], cluster3[,2]),
  cluster = factor(rep(c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3"),
                       each = n)))
# scaling
k3_df_scaled <- k3_df
k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k3_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: 400 ss crab

ss400_ns_df <- k3_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

ss400_ns_df
write.csv(ss400_ns_df, "ss400_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: 750 ss
set.seed(590)

# number of observations per cluster
n <- 750/3

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma1 <- matrix(c(4, 3,
                   3, 3), nrow = 2)
cluster1 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(0, 0), 
                    Sigma = sigma1)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma2 <- matrix(c(6, 0,
                   0, 0.25), nrow = 2)
cluster2 <- mvrnorm(n, 
                    mu = c(6, 4), 
                    Sigma = sigma2)

# generate points from mvnorm disb'n
sigma3 <- matrix(c(4, 1.5,
                   1.5, 1), nrow = 2)
cluster3 <- mvrnorm(n, mu = c(6, -3.5), 
                    Sigma = sigma3)

# join points to create data frame
k3_df <- data.frame(
  X1 = c(cluster1[,1], cluster2[,1], cluster3[,1]),
  X2 = c(cluster1[,2], cluster2[,2], cluster3[,2]),
  cluster = factor(rep(c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3"),
                       each = n)))
# scaling
k3_df_scaled <- k3_df
k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)] <- scale(k3_df_scaled[,c(1,2)])

# plot data
ggplot(k3_df_scaled, aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
#| label: 750 ss crab

ss750_ns_df <- k3_df |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("X1", "X2")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 30, 
              subsample_prop = 0.85, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()

ss750_ns_df
write.csv(ss750_ns_df, "ss750_ns.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

### Mixed Shapes
